title: Internal error in V3Gate dedup with -fno-inline on tri0/tri1 ports

features.name: tri0 net declaration on input port
features.description: Code should include an input port declared with tri0 net type combined with a buf gate primitive
features.snippet:
input tri0 wire data_in;
buf b1 (data_out, data_in);

features.name: tri1 net declaration on input port
features.description: Code should include an input port declared with tri1 net type combined with a buf gate primitive
features.snippet:
input tri1 wire data_in;
buf b1 (data_out, data_in);

features.name: buf gate primitive with tri0/tri1 nets under no_inline
features.description: Code should include buf gate primitives operating on tri0/tri1 nets in a module compiled with no_inline attribute
